titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 150: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 150. (A.R. No. 630 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Umā-Mahēśvara temple.

This registers an undertaking given by the managers of the temple (kōyil-uḍaiyār) at Tirunallam, a brahmadēyam in Veṇ-nāḍu, such as Kaviśiyaṉ Mūṉṉūṟṟuva Nakkaṉ and others, (all belonged to Kausika-gōtra, to the body called paramēśvara-pēriḷamaiyār of the above village. The latter body had granted land of seven mā in two plots of six mā and one mā to god Gaṇapati-bhaṭṭārar for providing food offerings to that god at the rate of four nāḻi of rice for the early morning and midday services and two nāḻi of rice at night service and also other items accompanying the food offerings. It is stated that the kōyil-uḍaiyār agreed to manage the land as they thought fit and provide the necessary paddy etc., for the said services.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 348.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirunallattu śrīkoyiluṭaiya kaviciyaṉ muṉṉūṟṟuva nakkaṉum kaviciyaṉ cāttaṉ cantiracekaranum kaviciyaṉ nakkaṉ tarukkaṉum kaviciyaṉ cāttaṉ cāttaṉum kaviciyaṉ cāttaṉ nakkaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa śrīkoyiluṭaiyom
Ivvūr parameśvaraperiḷamaiyār gaṇapatiyārkkuk kuṭutta nilam Ivvūr kiḻur nilam Iṉṉilam Aṟumāvukkum Ellai kīḻpālkellai tirukkiḻkoṭṭamuṭaiya mahādevar nilattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Idevar nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ānāṟṟukku teṟkum Āka
vicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilam Aṟumāvum Inṉam kiḻūrt turuttiyil nilam Oru māvukkum Ellai kiḻpālkellai tirunallamuṭaiya mahādevar nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Āritaṉ cāmiciṅkaṉum tampimār nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkel
lai kuḷattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Icaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilam Iṉnilam Oru māvum Ākattaṭi Iraṇṭā Iṉnilam Oru māvum Ākattaṭi Iraṇṭā Iṉ nilam Eḻumāvum Ivvāṭṭaic cantirātittaval Iṉṉilam Anupavittu Igaṇapati
bhaṭārarkku niccaṟpaṭi ceyyakkaṭava paṭimāṟṟāvatu ciṟu kālai santiyil tiruvamurtu Arici nānāḻiyum Ucciyam potai santiyil Arici nānāḻiyum Irāvai santiyil Arici Iru nāḻiyum Ākak kuttalpūri patināḻiyum muṉ[ṟu sa]ntikkumāka neyamutoru piṭiyum nāḻi Uḻakku nelliṉ kaṟiyamutum tai
yiramutu nāḻi Uriyum Aṭaikkāyamutu Āṟum Āka niccaṟpaṭi cantirātittaval Iṉṉilam Eḻu māvum tāṅkaḷ veṇṭum vaṇṇam Anupavittu cantirātittaval Iṉṉivattam ceyvom Ānom Ivvūr tirukkoyiluṭaiyom pa[ nmā] heśvara rakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
